confidence_notes: Extracted only skills with demonstrated project or coursework evidence. Python and JavaScript have documented projects (Hello World App). Java has documented class assignment (Calculator). Git is a standard tool for developers. All other self-reported skills were excluded because they lack concrete evidence of actual use - the resume shows only exposure through tutorials/online courses without completed projects. The extensive skill list appears to be aspirational rather than demonstrating real proficiency. Being conservative to reflect actual hands-on experience rather than theoretical knowledge.
